studyName: FLG LoF Variants are Associated with Atopic Dermatitis in an Early-Life Prospective Cohort

variables.name: AD_SEVERITY
variables.description: AD severity at visit 1. Derived from SCORAD

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for Atopic Dermatitis (AD); all subjects are AD patients.

variables.name: AFR_ANCESTRY
variables.description: Genomic percentage of African Ancestry based on Genome Wide Ancestry Genotyping Array

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Subject age at enrollment

variables.name: ALLERGIC_RHINITIS
variables.description: At V1, does the child have allergic rhinitis or related symptoms

variables.name: ANY_SENSITIZATION
variables.description: At V1, is the participant sensitized to any allergen?

variables.name: FLG_LESIONAL_MAX
variables.description: Filaggrin expression (FLG) from skin tapes at lesional site at visit 1

variables.name: FLG_NON_LESIONAL_MAX
variables.description: Filaggrin expression (FLG) from skin tapes at non-lesional site at visit 1

variables.name: FOOD_ALLERGY
variables.description: At V1, has the child been told by a doctor that he/she is allergic to any foods?

variables.name: LESIONAL_TEWL
variables.description: Transepidermal water loss (TEWL) measurement at lesional site at visit 1 (grams of water per square meter per hour)

variables.name: NON_LESIONAL_TEWL
variables.description: Transepidermal water loss (TEWL) measurement at non-lesional site at visit 1 (grams of water per square meter per hour)

variables.name: PARS
variables.description: PARS (pediatric asthma risk score) at each visit

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Self-reported race

variables.name: SCORAD
variables.description: SCORAD at visit 1

variables.name: SENSITIZATION_GROUP
variables.description: Sensitization group at visit 1 (none, food, aero, or both)

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: COLLECTION_AGE
variables.description: Age sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
